settings.title: Meet the Experts
settings.heading: Let us introduce ourselves
settings.text: Get to know the friendly faces that you see every day!

settings.main_quote: “I’ve been surrounded by crafts from a young age.”
settings.main_text: I’m Sara, and I’m the founder and creative director of Crafter’s Companion. I’ve been surrounded by crafts from a young age and I’m really fortunate that I’ve made a career out of doing what I love! Join me for lots of papercraft inspiration, tips and exciting demonstrations with all of your favourite Crafter’s Companion, Gemini, Sara Signature and Spectrum Noir products. I’ll also keep you up to date with our newest and most fabulous launches!

settings.main_quote: “I can’t wait to get creative with you all and learn some new crafts!”
settings.main_text: I love all things papercraft, from die cutting to stencilling and everything in between. Keep an eye out for exciting new product launches!

settings.main_quote: “I’m a crafter heart, I’ve been creating in one way or another nearly all my life.”
settings.main_text: I have a passion for home decor and love creating my own using different crafting techniques! Find me with the Gemini Die Cutting and Embossing Machine creating intricate designs to hang around the home.

settings.name: Sara Davies
settings.main_quote: “I’ve been surrounded by crafts from a young age.”

settings.name: Ben Moseby
settings.main_quote: “I can’t wait to get creative with you all and learn some new crafts!”

settings.name: Sheena Douglas
settings.main_quote: “I love to inspire people to try something new.”

settings.name: Becky Sworn
settings.main_quote: “I’ve spent most of my life with a needle or a paintbrush in my hand!”

settings.name: Corrine Robinson
settings.main_quote: “My first love is papercraft & die cutting, it still amazes me what you can do with a die & paper.”

settings.name: Debby Robinson
settings.main_quote: “My true passions are die-cutting and embossing.”

settings.name: Debbie Fisher
settings.main_quote: “Let me colour and craft your world.”

settings.name: Lilly Fletcher
settings.main_quote: “I love to get creative with colouring but I’m a typical crafter who loves to try anything new.”

settings.name: Michelle McCarthy
settings.main_quote: “I love to make anything and everything with paper and card!”

settings.title: Craft Experts
settings.text: Get to know our Craft Experts!

settings.heading: Available on catchup
settings.text: Never miss a show again! No matter the time or place, catch up on your favourite Crafter's TV show. Catch up on yesterday's Wake Up Call, last week's Craft Along, last year's Launch Party and so many more shows at any time on our YouTube channel!
